description: Wistful conversation about someday having a team offsite. No specific dates, times, or commitments are made. Pure hypothetical future-wishing.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The offsite discussion uses language like 'someday', 'wouldn't it be nice', and 'maybe once the project wraps up', indicating aspirational thinking with no concrete scheduling commitment.

notes: Classic someday/wouldn't-it-be-nice hypothetical. No dates, no times, no commitments. The model must resist extracting a vague offsite event.
